runs.prompt: A cartoon of 20 seconds with an agentic family. 2d cartoon paper mache style like sifu the game kicked-up dust and debris particles, parallax sky with drifting clouds and a warm sun.no user input, pure autoplaying simulation.

runs.title: Cars vs Canyon
runs.prompt:
A 2D side-view physics simulation: a red car and a blue car race in from the left, hit launch ramps and jump across a deep canyon side by side. Suspension 
  compression and bounce on landing, kicked-up dust and debris particles, parallax sky with drifting clouds and a warm sun. After each jump the cars reset and run again with
  slightly different speeds, forever. Fixed camera, no user input, pure autoplaying simulation.
